retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional (if the pointer is non-NULL). If the refcount were somehow zero on entry, calling put again would be a double-free; retry is never correct for put wrappers.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for struct aa_policydb. It decrements the reference count via kref_put and, if the count drops to zero, calls aa_pdb_free_kref to free the object. The function safely tolerates NULL pointers. After calling aa_put_pdb, the caller must not access the pdb object because it may have been freed. This function represents the standard release of a reference in the policy database's lifecycle.
